title: Potato Mashers, Joyoldelf Potato Masher Stainless Steel, Masher with Non-Slip Handle, Fruit & Vegetable Baby Food Masher
features: 【Innovative Design】: Potato masher handle made of Silica gel material is more non-slip than stainless steel handle and prevents hands from being scratched.The sturdy and broad mashing plate, plus the well-balanced and ergonomically designed non-slip handle with comfortable grip allow easy mashing under gentle pressure without tirelessly working in the kitchen all day.
【430 Stainless Steel】: High quality 430 stainless steel Potato Masher is acid and alkali resistant, corrosion, resistant, strong and healthy. Potato mashers 100% safe and rust-proof.

【Save Space】: The food masher comes with a hanging hole at the top of handle, you can hang it up on kitchen hooks for easy storage when not in use. Meanwhile, You can clean it by hand or in a dishwasher.

【Wide Range of Usage】: Mash potato masher is a great ideal tool of mashing potatoes and other food, such as mashed potatoes, cooked carrot, sweet potato, cheese etc, excellent for preparing baby food and fresh fruit juice.
【Package and Service】: You get a stainless steel potato masher. We offer lifelong customer service and ensure that you get a fantastic shopping experience. There is a return service within one year.
description: Product Description Enjoy Good Time Together Getting back home and unloading the tiredness of one whole day? what's your next step then? That's a start of another happy but painful travel - cooking for your family. You need a effcient tool to save your time, because there are lots of other things waiting for you. You need a easy tool to save your labor, because the cleaning job is harder than cooking itself. You need a wonderful tool to make a delicious mashed potato with better taste. Double Arch Structure Double arch structure allows the potato pressure to bear more pressure It's a good helper to save time and labor. Smooth Round Holes Help to crush potatoes more fine and smooth. Enjoy more delicious mashed potato. Ergonomic Silicone Handle Ergonomic design make it fit hands, easy to use & hold. Silicone Handle make the feeling more textured and more comfortable.
